description: YouTube Data API v3 (trimmed read-only subset: search, videos, channels, playlists, playlistItems) for blog-research workflows. API-key auth only; OAuth-required write operations are out of scope.

env_var_specs.name: YOUTUBE_API_KEY
env_var_specs.description: YouTube Data API key for read-only public-data operations

tools.name: youtube_channels-list
tools.description: Retrieves a list of resources, possibly filtered. Optional: categoryId, forUsername, hl (plus 4 more). Returns the ChannelListResponse.

params.name: categoryId
params.description: Return the channels within the specified guide category ID.

params.name: forUsername
params.description: Return the channel associated with a YouTube username.

params.name: hl
params.description: Stands for 'host language'. Specifies the localization language of the metadata to be filled into snippet.localized. The field is filled with the default metadata if there is no localization in the specified language. The parameter value must be a language code included in the list returned by the i18nLanguages.list method (e.g. en_US, es_MX).

params.name: id
params.description: Return the channels with the specified IDs.

params.name: managedByMe
params.description: Return the channels managed by the authenticated user.

params.name: mine
params.description: Return the ids of channels owned by the authenticated user.

params.name: mySubscribers
params.description: Return the channels subscribed to the authenticated user

tools.name: youtube_playlist-items-list
tools.description: Retrieves a list of resources, possibly filtered. Optional: id, playlistId, videoId. Returns the PlaylistItemListResponse.

params.name: id
params.description: Id

params.name: playlistId
params.description: Return the playlist items within the given playlist.

params.name: videoId
params.description: Return the playlist items associated with the given video ID.

tools.name: youtube_playlists-list
tools.description: Retrieves a list of resources, possibly filtered. Optional: channelId, hl, id (plus 2 more). Returns the PlaylistListResponse.

params.name: channelId
params.description: Return the playlists owned by the specified channel ID.

params.name: hl
params.description: Return content in specified language

params.name: id
params.description: Return the playlists with the given IDs for Stubby or Apiary.

params.name: mine
params.description: Return the playlists owned by the authenticated user.

params.name: onBehalfOfContentOwnerChannel
params.description: This parameter can only be used in a properly authorized request. *Note:* This parameter is intended exclusively for YouTube content partners. The *onBehalfOfContentOwnerChannel* parameter specifies the YouTube channel ID of the channel to which a video is being added. This parameter is required when a request specifies a value for the onBehalfOfContentOwner parameter, and it can only be used in conjunction with that parameter. In addition, the request must be authorized using a CMS account that is linked to the content owner that the onBehalfOfContentOwner parameter specifies. Finally, the channel that the onBehalfOfContentOwnerChannel parameter value specifies must be linked to the content owner that the onBehalfOfContentOwner parameter specifies. This parameter is intended for YouTube content partners that own and manage many different YouTube channels. It allows content owners to authenticate once and perform actions on behalf of the channel specified in the parameter value, without having to provide authentication credentials for each separate channel.

tools.name: youtube_search-list
tools.description: Retrieves a list of search resources. Optional: channelId, channelType, eventType (plus 24 more). Returns the SearchListResponse.

params.name: channelId
params.description: Filter on resources belonging to this channelId.

params.name: channelType
params.description: Add a filter on the channel search.

params.name: eventType
params.description: Filter on the livestream status of the videos.

params.name: forContentOwner
params.description: Search owned by a content owner.

params.name: forDeveloper
params.description: Restrict the search to only retrieve videos uploaded using the project id of the authenticated user.

params.name: forMine
params.description: Search for the private videos of the authenticated user.

params.name: location
params.description: Filter on location of the video

params.name: locationRadius
params.description: Filter on distance from the location (specified above).

params.name: order
params.description: Sort order of the results.

params.name: publishedAfter
params.description: Filter on resources published after this date.

params.name: publishedBefore
params.description: Filter on resources published before this date.

params.name: q
params.description: Textual search terms to match.

params.name: regionCode
params.description: Display the content as seen by viewers in this country.

params.name: relatedToVideoId
params.description: Search related to a resource.

params.name: relevanceLanguage
params.description: Return results relevant to this language.

params.name: safeSearch
params.description: Indicates whether the search results should include restricted content as well as standard content.

params.name: topicId
params.description: Restrict results to a particular topic.

params.name: type
params.description: Restrict results to a particular set of resource types from One Platform.

params.name: videoCaption
params.description: Filter on the presence of captions on the videos.

params.name: videoCategoryId
params.description: Filter on videos in a specific category.

params.name: videoDefinition
params.description: Filter on the definition of the videos.

params.name: videoDimension
params.description: Filter on 3d videos.

params.name: videoDuration
params.description: Filter on the duration of the videos.

params.name: videoEmbeddable
params.description: Filter on embeddable videos.

params.name: videoLicense
params.description: Filter on the license of the videos.

params.name: videoSyndicated
params.description: Filter on syndicated videos.

params.name: videoType
params.description: Filter on videos of a specific type.

tools.name: youtube_videos-list
tools.description: Retrieves a list of resources, possibly filtered. Optional: chart, hl, id (plus 6 more). Returns the VideoListResponse.

params.name: chart
params.description: Return the videos that are in the specified chart.

params.name: hl
params.description: Stands for 'host language'. Specifies the localization language of the metadata to be filled into snippet.localized. The field is filled with the default metadata if there is no localization in the specified language. The parameter value must be a language code included in the list returned by the i18nLanguages.list method (e.g. en_US, es_MX).

params.name: id
params.description: Return videos with the given ids.

params.name: locale
params.description: Locale

params.name: maxHeight
params.description: Max height

params.name: maxWidth
params.description: Return the player with maximum height specified in

params.name: myRating
params.description: Return videos liked/disliked by the authenticated user. Does not support RateType.RATED_TYPE_NONE.

params.name: regionCode
params.description: Use a chart that is specific to the specified region

params.name: videoCategoryId
params.description: Use chart that is specific to the specified video category
